title: Rotom-push
body:
# **Adds A new Cobblemon form for Rotom!**
- The new Rotom form is named **Rotom Push**!
- **Electric**/**Ground** type
- This Rotom entered a piston, and learned the move **earth power**!

  
![Rotom-Push](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78bcd01ea57bd69cc38b601d5c2f08e4581d0578.png)
________________________________________________________________________________________________
# **How to install**
1. Download the datapack for your version.
2. Add the file to your resource packs, and enable it.
3. Add the file to your datapack under saves/[worldname]/datapacks
4. Select the world and play!
________________________________________________________________________________________________

# **Change Rotoms form!**

- You can change Rotoms form by right clicking it with the **data monitor**, and you can return it back to normal by either **using the data monitor** again, or by **right clicking a placed, non oxidized copper bulb**!
 
- By downloading the [Copper Appliances mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-appliances), Rotom can change forms by right clicking the corresponding copper appliance!(You can read more about that in the [mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-appliances))

- **_Disclaimer_**: This Pack only adds Rotom Push, it is recommanded to run it with the [Rotom Appliances Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rotom-appliances) to see the rest of the forms in game!

________________________________________________________________________________________________
# **Where does it spawn?**
- Near PCs and Data monitors(uncommon spawn)
- In the deep dark, near redstone related blocks(common spawn)
- In the trial chambers, near waxed copper bulbs(uncommon spawn)
- In the woodland mansion(uncommon spawn)
- In the plains biome, while thundering(uncommon spawn)
